info.name: User app — Rider (Flutter ApiEndpoints)
info.description:
Saari **user/rider** app endpoints jo Flutter `ApiEndpoints` list se aati hain (`/api/v1/...`).

**Token:** `userAccessToken` = `POST /api/v1/user/login` (ya register flow) ke response se `access_token`.

**Methods:** Backend ke hisaab se set kiye gaye (e.g. `list-recent-searches` = **POST**, `delete-favourite-location` = **GET** + id path mein).

**Maps:** Google Routes URL app direct call karti hai — neeche optional placeholder.

Regenerate: `npm run postman:user`.

request.description: Response se `access_token` ko collection variable `userAccessToken` mein daalein.
Body apne registration schema ke mutabiq bharein.
Exact fields validation middleware se verify karein.
Backend: **GET** with Mongo id path param (Flutter string check karein).
Backend par **POST** hai; body app ke mutabiq.
Full booking payload — app se copy karein.

item.name: 10. Common — goods, cancel, FAQ, complaint, SOS

request.description: Ye **Google** URL hai — Node backend par route nahi. `googleRoutesKey` mein Routes API key daalein.
